brand.name: We buy K
brand.tagline: The hybrid K-commerce concierge — buy from any Korean shop, pick up at the airport or ship home.

home.heroTitle: Shop Korea like a local. Receive it like magic.
home.heroSub: Paste any Coupang, Naver, or Gmarket URL. We buy it, inspect it, and hand it to you at Incheon — or forward it to your home country.
home.step1: Sign up — instant Korean virtual mailbox.
home.step2: Paste a product URL — we parse it.
home.step3: We buy & receive at our bonded hub.
home.step4: Photo inspection arrives in your inbox.
home.step5: Pick up at ICN, or forward worldwide.

address.title: Your virtual Korean address
address.intro: Use this exact address (including the recipient code) when checking out at any Korean shop or asking a seller to ship to you.

order.title: Place a proxy order
order.intro: Paste the URL of any Korean shopping site product. We'll parse the price and add it to your cart with the all-in fee preview.
order.coupangNotice: blocks server-side scraping. Please use the one-click
order.previewHint: Hit Preview to verify the title, price and fees before adding.

cart.title: Your cart
cart.emptySub: There are two ways to add Korean products to We buy K.
cart.howToADesc: Copy a product page URL and paste it on the order page. Optimised for Naver, Kream, Gmarket, 11st.
cart.howToBDesc: Install once on your bookmarks bar and any Korean shop becomes one click away. Bypasses bot detection.

orders.title: My orders
orders.emptySub: Build your first proxy order from the cart.

bookmarklet.title: We buy K Bookmarklet
bookmarklet.subtitle: A browser bookmark that adds Korean products to your We buy K cart with one click — directly from any shop's product page.
bookmarklet.why1: Sites like Coupang block server-side scraping. The bookmarklet runs inside your browser instead, so bot detection doesn't apply.
bookmarklet.why2: No more copy-paste. Click once on a product page and it lands in your cart.
bookmarklet.why3: Tries JSON-LD, OpenGraph, and site-specific selectors so it works on virtually any shop.
bookmarklet.step1Desc: Windows / Linux: Ctrl + Shift + B · macOS: ⌘ + ⇧ + B
bookmarklet.step2Desc: Don't click — drag it onto the bookmarks bar with your mouse.
bookmarklet.step3Desc: Open a Coupang or Naver product page and click the bookmark — done.
bookmarklet.dragHint: ↑ Drag this onto your bookmarks bar
bookmarklet.trouble1: If popups are blocked, allow them via the address bar icon.
bookmarklet.trouble2: Some pages load price dynamically — wait 1–2 seconds and try again.
bookmarklet.trouble3: If you're not signed in to We buy K, the popup will show a login prompt.
